snippet.title: The Secret Life Of Pets 2 | Official Trailer [HD] | Illumination
snippet.description:
The Secret Life Of Pets 2 - Official Trailer

Subscribe to Illumination: https://www.youtube.com/illumination

#TheSecretLifeOfPets2 #Illumination

About The Secret Life Of Pets 2:
The Secret Life of Pets 2, the sequel to the 2016 comedic animated blockbuster, explores the emotional lives of our pets, the deep bond between them and the families that love them, and answers the question: what are your pets doing when you're not home?

Follow The Secret Life Of Pets  on TWITTER: https://twitter.com/PetsMovie
Like The Secret Life Of Pets on FACEBOOK: https://www.facebook.com/TheSecretLifeOfPets
Check out The Secret Life Of Pets on INSTAGRAM: https://www.instagram.com/secretlifeofpets

About Illumination:
ILLUMINATION, founded by Academy Award® nominee Chris Meledandri in 2007, is one of the entertainment industry's leading producers of event-animated films and home to the highest grossing animated franchise in the world. Its iconic, beloved brands including DESPICABLE ME, THE SECRET LIFE OF PETS and SING - infused with memorable and distinct characters, global appeal and cultural relevance - have grossed more than $6.6 billion worldwide. ILLUMINATION was honored by Fast Company as one of the World's Most Innovative Companies.

In 2017, DESPICABLE ME 3 grossed over $1 billion worldwide and broke the record for opening weekend and single-day gross in China. Next summer, ILLUMINATION will release the follow-up to the third-highest grossing animated film of all time worldwide with MINIONS: THE RISE OF GRU.

Like Illumination on FACEBOOK: https://www.facebook.com/illuminationent
Check out Illumination on INSTAGRAM: https://www.instagram.com/illuminationent
